title: Curriculum Intern (2-3 Months Contract)
description:
Job Description

  • Curriculum Development & Writing: Design, write, and refine engaging English, Math, and Science curriculum
  • Lesson Resource Creation: Prepare and produce high-quality, visually appealing, and instructionally sound digital lesson slides (e.g., using PowerPoint, Google Slides, or similar tools) for all subject areas.
  • Resource Alignment: Ensure all curriculum materials and lesson slides are fully aligned with learning objectives, educational standards (if applicable), and current pedagogical best practices.
  • Assessment Integration: Develop formative and summative assessment materials that can be seamlessly integrated into the lesson slides and overall curriculum design to gauge student understanding.
  • Collaboration & Feedback: Work closely with the teaching team and/or curriculum lead to review content, incorporate feedback, and ensure consistency across all prepared materials.
  • Material Maintenance: Organise, catalog, and maintain the library of developed curriculum documents and digital lesson resources for future use and easy access.


Working Days And Hours : Monday to Friday (35 Hours per Week)
Working Location : Link @ AMK

Job Requirement

  • Syllabus Savvy with current MOE trend.

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2017, Geniebook offers Primary and Secondary school students a powerful suite of online learning solutions which includes our signature AI-personalised worksheets (GenieSmart), live classes with our teachers (GenieClass), and our latest online chat function (GenieAsk) - all designed to maximize improvement and the joy of learning.


Geniebook is an EdTech backed by East Ventures Growth, Lightspeed Venture Partners and other prominent angel investors.


We firmly believe that students should have access to a personalized world-class education helping them grow into confident learners and contributors to society. This same belief continues to spur us on at Geniebook to help students to learn smarter, do better with the best of technology and learning pedagogies. Today, Geniebook is a familiar household name with a diverse team serving more than 150,000 users regionally. In addition to our headquarters in Singapore, Geniebook also has a presence in Malaysia, Indonesia, and Vietnam.


If you are an experienced educator, tech wizard, data expert, designer, go-getter, or someone who cares deeply about the future of education, we welcome you to join us in our exciting journey through the paradigm shift in education.
postedCompany.name: GENIEBOOK PTE. LTD.
